response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong full-stack engineering skills, distributed systems experience, and some exposure to agentic AI tooling (MCP, AI-agent infrastructure), but lacks direct production experience with multi-agent systems, fintech infrastructure, or regulated environments. His leadership background is unclear beyond technical roles, and fintech-specific depth is missing.
strengths: Extensive backend/distributed systems experience (event-driven systems, microservices, real-time data).
Hands-on with AI-agent frameworks (MCP, custom orchestration) and developer tooling.
Proven ability to scale engineering practices (CI/CD, TDD, trunk-based development) in high-throughput environments.
concerns: No explicit experience with multi-agent AI systems in production or fintech contexts.
Lacks demonstrated fintech infrastructure expertise (credit risk, working-capital management, payment flows).
Unclear track record in scaling engineering teams or leading hybrid delivery models with external partners.
